steps.title: Locate the relevant sentence
steps.content: The passage states: "In 2017, Salazar created an impressive life-size piñata-like sculpture of the Gypsy Rose lowrider car, which was displayed at the Petersen Automotive Museum in Los Angeles, California." The displayed work is a sculpture of a lowrider car.

steps.title: Match the description to a choice
steps.content: The text specifies (a) a sculpture, not a painting, and (b) of the Gypsy Rose lowrider car, not of a person or a city. Only the sculpture-of-Gypsy-Rose description fits both constraints.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — A painting of Los Angeles: wrong medium (painting) and wrong subject — not supported by the text. ✗
  • Choice B — A sculpture of a lowrider car: matches the passage exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — A painting of a piñata: wrong medium — Salazar's work is a sculpture, not a painting. ✗
  • Choice D — A sculpture of Jesse Valadez: overreads — Valadez drove the Gypsy Rose, but the sculpture depicts the car, not him. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
